feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Billing and Shipping Address in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hii Experts,

i have a scenario where I make an order from one location that is my billing location will be different and I need the materials to be shipped to a different location. How do I achieve this in SAP business one.

entry.title: BP Master Data - 'ID No. 2' field is not editable for a specific user
entry.content:
Hi, 

The issue happen to this specific user, the user  has full authorization for business partner master data, however, the field ‘Company Reg No’ (original name of this field is 'ID No. 2') is not editable. This happen to all BP types, whether is Add or Update mode. There is no UI configuration in the BP master data.

I have tried login using this affected user, go to edit UI configuration, and tried 'Restore Default' UI, but no help.

Any idea?

Phoebe

entry.title: Blocking of Sales Order thru SP Transaction Notification
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Im about to block Sales Order thru SP Notification, I Create a simple code to check if the customer has Open Invoices in the AR Module and if it does, it will block the sales order for that particular order unless the AR Document of the previous transaction is closed here is my code.

IF(@object_type = '17') and (@transaction_type in ('A', 'U'))

BEGIN

IF Exists (SELECT T0.CardCode FROM OINV T0

WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del AND T0.[DocStatus] = 'O' AND T0.CANCELED='N' )

BEGIN

SET @error = 1001

SET @error_message = 'You have Pending AR invoice Open, Please Settle Customer Account. Thank you!'

End

End

Apparently the code block Sales Order for all Customers even they dont have AR Invoice Open Documents.

what you think is the problem? anyone can help me?

entry.title: Last Invoice Date in List of Customer Business Partners
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it possible to show Last Invoice Date in List of Customer Business Partner Master Data or Query Statement?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Remove yellow drill down arrows in query
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to remove the yellow drill down arrows in this query. Especially for the field DocNum because the wrong documents open because of Union All.

Is this the right way to do that? CAST (T0.[DocNum] as nvarchar) as 'Documentnummer', 

 

 

SELECT
'Klantorder' AS 'Document',
T0.[DocDate],
T0.[CardCode],
T0.[CardName],
T0.[DocNum],
T1.[ItemCode],
T1.[Dscription],
T1.[Quantity],
T1.[TreeType]

FROM
ORDR T0
INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]

WHERE
T0.[CardCode] =[%0] AND
T1.[Dscription] Like '%%[%1]%%' AND
T1.[TreeType] <> 'I' AND
T0.[CANCELED] = 'N'

UNION ALL

SELECT
'Uitgaande factuur en betaling' AS 'Document',
T0.[DocDate],
T0.[CardCode],
T0.[CardName],
T0.[DocNum],
T1.[ItemCode],
T1.[Dscription],
T1.[Quantity],
T1.[TreeType]

FROM
OINV T0
INNER JOIN INV1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]

WHERE
T0.[CardCode] =[%0] AND
T1.[Dscription] Like '%%[%1]%%' AND
T1.[TreeType] <> 'I' AND
T0.[CANCELED] = 'N' AND
T0.[IsICT] = 'Y'

ORDER BY
2

entry.title: Approve a document via Service Layer - SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I need to approve a document via Service Layer.
The API call below allows me to approve a document using the user currently logged-in (the user of the current Service Layer session).

PATCH https://myhost:50000/b1s/v1/ApprovalRequests(1)

{
"ApprovalRequestDecisions": [
{
"Status": "ardApproved",
"Remarks": "Approved - OK"
}
]
}

How can I approve a document assigned to another user please?
Where can I find documentation for the ApprovalRequestDecisions API call please?

I'm using FP2202 HF1.

Thank you,
Best Regards,
Claudio

entry.title: Workaround to reconcile AR Invoice(having WTax of type Payment) with the On Account Incoming Payment
entry.content:
At present when I am trying to reconcile I get this message - Use the same payment category withholding tax code for all transactions during reconciliation.

Please suggest a work around.

I am using SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.230) SP 2311 (Security) HOTFIX1 (64-bit)

entry.title: Error while Enable the Audit Database logs
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
 
While creating the Audit log policy we are facing error message as attached in the screenshot.
 
Please check & revert with the workaround.
 
Thanks in advance.
 

 

Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Equipment Card Search
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When searching in equipment card window, in the list displayed, Item Number is showing Item Description. Is this a bug? In Item Description, it is showing the correct information. There are no other fields showing the Item Code.

SAP B1 is version 10.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Formatted Search for Bin Location Allocation
entry.content:
Hello Experts, Hope you are well!

I am currently trying to develop a new FMS UDF to integrate into our Goods Receipt PO table in the aim to display the allocated BIn location for each line. however my logic need some work:

SELECT  T1.[BinCode] FROM PDN1 T0  INNER JOIN OBIN T1 ON T0.DftBinAbs = T1.AbsEntry WHERE T0.[ItemCode] = $[861.3.0]

Is this somthing that is possible to achieve?

entry.title: Editar casilla Factura ventas Importe del Impuesto
entry.content:
Hola a todos!

en ocasiones tenemos discrepancia en las facturas clientes en el impuesto.

En proveedores, la casilla "importe del impuesto" se la deja modificar cuando alguna discrepancia en el importe del IVA por redondeos.

En clientes, este campo no podemos editarlo. ¿Hay alguna forma de mantener el campo editable en ventas también igual que está en compras?

entry.title: Unreconciled AR Transactions Query
entry.content:
Hi,
I am not sure if this is the right group for this...

I have this query that shows the first part shows me all the AR invoices that were paid with the reconcilation from the 2nd part of the query.

This all works fine. However I am trying to get the check number from the 2nd part of the query to be on each line for the payment  So the DocNum on ScrObjTyp = 24 should be on all of the lines where the ScrObjTyp = 13

SELECT T2."TotalExpns" AS "Total Freight",T2."NumAtCard", T6."ItemCode" AS "ItemCode", T6."Dscription" AS "ItemDesc", T6."Quantity", T6."LineTotal",T7."SlpName", '' AS "CardName", T0."ReconNum",T1."SrcObjAbs" AS "DocEntry", T1."SrcObjTyp" AS "Type 13 Inv 24 Incoming Payment", T2."DocNum", T2."FatherCard", T2."CardCode", T1."ReconSum", '' AS "DocDate", '' AS "CheckNo" FROM OITR T0 

INNER JOIN ITR1 T1 ON T0."ReconNum" = T1."ReconNum"

INNER JOIN OINV T2 ON T1."SrcObjAbs" = T2."DocEntry"

INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T2."DocEntry" = T6."DocEntry"

INNER JOIN OSLP T7 ON T2."SlpCode" = T7."SlpCode"

WHERE T0."ReconNum" ='52837' AND  T0."Canceled" = 'N' AND  T0."IsCard" = 'C' AND T1."SrcObjTyp" = '13'

 

UNION ALL

SELECT 0 AS "Total Freight", '' AS "NumAtCard",'' AS "ItemCode", '' AS "ItemDesc", 0 AS "Quantity", 0 AS "LineTotal", '' AS "SlpName", T4."CardName", T0."ReconNum",T1."SrcObjAbs" AS "DocEntry", T1."SrcObjTyp" AS "Type 13 Inv 24 Incoming Payment", T2."DocNum", T2."FatherCard", T2."CardCode", T1."ReconSum", T3."DocDate", T3."CounterRef" AS "CheckNo" FROM OITR T0  INNER JOIN ITR1 T1 ON T0."ReconNum" = T1."ReconNum" INNER JOIN OINV T2 ON T1."SrcObjAbs" = T2."DocEntry"

INNER JOIN ORCT T3 ON T3."DocEntry" = T1."SrcObjAbs"

INNER JOIN OINV T4 ON T2."DocNum" = T4."DocNum"

WHERE T0."ReconNum" ='52837' AND  T0."Canceled" = 'N' AND  T0."IsCard" = 'C'  AND T1."SrcObjTyp" = '24'

ORDER BY T0."ReconNum

entry.title: Menu bar not showing properly #60930
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
We are experiencing an issue in SAP where the menu text appears in white font color, making it invisible. We attempted to resolve this by changing the skin style from Belize Deep to Fiori, but this resulted in a change to the home page color.
 
I have checked the User Master and found that no default user is mapped. To verify, I compared the settings for the client and noticed that the User Master Display Skin Style is blank, whereas in my case, it is set to Belize Deep.
 
I tried clicking on "Restore Default" and updated the settings, but after refreshing the page, the same settings reappear.
 
Could you please advise on what might be causing this issue and how we can resolve it?
 
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Required SP Transaction Notification for to Restrict user to Update Batch Expiration Date SAP b1
entry.content:
Hi,

We Required SP Transaction Notification  Restrict user to Update Batch Expiration Date SAP b1 10.0

entry.title: Error while doing the AP invoice based on the GRPO - Realized conversion diff account is not Define
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are facing the error as "Realized conversion diff account is not Defined" while doing the AP invoice based on the GRPO.

We have checked all configurations in the SAP GL account determination, but couldn't get any resolution.

SAP Version 9.3 HANA.

Below is the attached screenshot for your reference.

Please share your observations with us.

 

Regards,

Shubham Bulley

entry.title: The value of the 'Tax' output parameter of the formula is missing
entry.content:
Hi, 

I created a new formula for Tax (Brazil TAX), IPI with ICMS calculation base, but it has an error due to the lack of tax output parameters.

How do I identify where to fix this error?

entry.title: How can I clear a draft of a canceled document from the Approval process
entry.content:
Hello Gurus, 

My client has an approval stage set up, and needs to change the list of Authorizers due to company turnover. 

When removing that person from the list of Authorizers and adding the intended replacement, we receive the following red band error: 

Cannot update approval stage; existing authorization processes are based on current stage

So, navigating to Administration -> Approval Process -> Approval Status Report, and entering the following Selection Criteria: 

With Template From: and Template To: specifying the Approval Stage that needs to be altered.

In the results, I see Purchase Order Document Draft 51526 listed. The Document draft is listed as Status: Approved, and when opened, above the header the document reads "Purchase Order -  Draft for Document Update [Approved].

When opening Purchase Order 51526, that document is canceled.

Reviewing the Change Log, I see that in History Instance 2, above the document header the document reads "Purchase Order - Document Update [Pending]", and by History Instance 3, the document was canceled. 

Now, to my question: How can I clear this Approved draft of a Canceled document so that the Approval Stage can be modified? 

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Unable to Open to Open Item List in SAP Business One 10
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a problem in SAP Business One 10 (FP2208), HANA Db,
Some of our users are unable to open the Open Item List from the Sales - AR,

As per SAP note 3287549, they need to open the Open Item List from Inventory section.

Error "Table not found '' (Y) (ODBC - 2004) [Message 131-183]".

Since they are finance/Sales users, I cannot allow them to use the inventory section.


 

Can you guide me how can I solve this problem ?

Regards,

Salman

entry.title: How to exclude weekends in due date calculation
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm using SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.180) FP 2111 and I'm encountering issues with due date calculations(AR Invoice). Specifically, I want to exclude weekends from these calculations. Here’s what I’ve done so far:

  1. Set up the holiday dates.
  2. Configured the first week to start on January 1.
  3. Defined the weekend as Saturday to Sunday.
  4. Unchecked the "set weekends as workdays".
  5. Made similar settings in the BP master data.

Despite these configurations, weekends are still being included in the due date calculations. Could you provide any insights or solutions to resolve this issue?

SAP Community SAP Business One

entry.title: Query Report Scheduler not supported in SAP B1 HANA ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Need to schedule a query report for the team, we are using SAP B1 Hana 10.0, came across a documentation stating the scheduling feature is not available for Hana Database. If this is correct, what are the alternatives for us to schedule reports ?
